stem:
f(x) = (1.84)^(x/4)

The function f is defined by the given equation. The equation can be rewritten as f(x) = (1 + p/100)^x, where p is a constant. Which of the following is closest to the value of p?
explanation: Rewriting gives f(x) = (1.84^(1/4))^x ≈ (1.1647)^x. Matching this to (1 + p/100)^x means 1 + p/100 ≈ 1.1647, so p/100 ≈ 0.1647 and p ≈ 16.5. Of the choices, 16 is closest.
